a.xlink:title: Builds a FireSimulator (and optional GUI Layout) from a SceneData.
Adjacency-list directed/undirected graph with Dijkstra shortest-path.
Minimal, dependency-free JSON parser for evacuation scene files.
Plain data structures describing a building evacuation scene.
Generic singly-linked list with pointer-based node storage.
Generic singly-linked node used by LinkedList and Queue.
Generic FIFO queue built on LinkedList.
Per-tick simulation entities: CellNode, Corridor, Person, WaitingQueue.
